name: Switcher
description: A toggle switch component for binary on/off states with loading support and custom content.
usage_guidelines: Use for binary settings or feature toggles.
Provide clear labels indicating on/off states.
Use checkedContent and unCheckedContent for state labels.
Set isLoading during async state changes.
Handle onChange to update application state.

styling_info.visual_description: A pill-shaped toggle with sliding circle indicator. Checked state uses primary color. Smooth transition animation. Optional text labels inside switch.

Dont: Don't use for multi-option selections (use Radio/Select)
Don't use for actions requiring confirmation
